title: epipactis striata
intro: Epipactis striata, also known as the Striped Helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The Striped Helleborine is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
